name: list
_note: photos.list returns the CALLER's own gallery (My photos) from the live user_photos table, per-user, never leaking across users. The assassin runs with an internal owner actor that has a real userId + live ctx.db, so {} returns ok:true with an empty page (no no_db, no no_user). count always equals photos.length. limit is a fail-CLOSED numeric guard — a poisoned value returns ok:false invalid_limit, never a clamped ok:true.
